message:
feat(fwc): add event filtering, history replay, and snapshot test suites (+2058 tests)

- event_stream.rs: EventFilter enum (TypeExact/TypeGlob/TypeRegex/FieldMatch/Exclude),
  FilterChain with AND composition, parse_filter_expr(), dot-path field resolution (+100 tests)
- history_replay.rs: ReplayPlan, HistoryRef, InputOverride, CompareResult types,
  build_replay_plan(), apply_overrides(), compare_entries(), TOON diff formatting (+123 tests)
- snapshot_help.rs: help text format, taxonomy, progressive disclosure tests (+78 tests)
- snapshot_recovery.rs: typo suggestions, ambiguous resolution, recovery tests (+83 tests)
- snapshot_workflow.rs: task/session/pipeline/batch projection tests (+67 tests)
- snapshot_invariants.rs: redaction, token budget, exit code, envelope tests (+76 tests)
- Fix duplicated clippy::redundant_pub_crate in bench_cmd.rs and new_cmd.rs

Beads: qnchs.8.2, 1g7z0.28.2, 1g7z0.18.1, 1g7z0.18.2, 1g7z0.18.3, 1g7z0.18.4
FWC total: 10,928 tests (10,961 including fixtures/integration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
